architecture_layers.value: Flat docs repo, no code layers: docs/ (playbook, owner-queue, dispatch-log — manager working memory) + templates/ (worker preamble blocks) + control/ (protocol heartbeat: owner-written inbox.md, manager-written status.md). Program record lives in menno420/superbot docs/eap/, never here.

drift_resolution.value: Source files and merged PRs win over any doc; when the playbook and reality disagree, fix the playbook the same session (friction -> rule, R-series).

fleet_dark_repos.value: all fleet siblings are public and readable read-only EXCEPT pokemon-mod-lab (PRIVATE — raw/clone hits an auth wall; roster marks it NOT MEASURED; never raw-fetch or guess about it). Live list of lanes: docs/roster.md (generated)

fleet_siblings.value: docs/roster.md is the generated sibling map — one row per lane: repo · seat/role · heartbeat verdict · kit version · triggers · HEAD evidence. Each sibling's truth files are its control/status*.md heartbeat(s) plus its docs/CAPABILITIES.md; regenerate-don't-restate — never hand-copy roster rows here

fleet_status_command.value: open docs/roster.md — the generated fleet roster (regenerated ~2-hourly by .github/workflows/roster-regen.yml via scripts/gen_roster.py; if its generated-at is >24h stale, trust the lane heartbeats directly per its kill-switch note)

mutation_seam.value: All changes land as forward-only git commits through READY PRs to main (ruleset: PR required); control/inbox.md is append-only and owner-written; control/status.md is overwritten by the manager each working session.

new_area_ownership.value: New areas default to the manager as sole writer; anything the owner must act on goes into docs/owner-queue.md, never a new scattered surface.

owner_profile.value: Non-coder product owner: plain language, decisions pre-chewed (recommendation + default), one deduplicated ask queue in docs/owner-queue.md; asks stay valid until acted on and carry click-level instructions.

ownership_model.value: One writer per file: the owner writes control/inbox.md; the manager writes everything else (docs/, templates/, control/status.md). Shared-repo protocol surfaces follow docs/playbook.md R9-R10.

primary_language.value: Markdown docs repo; tooling in Python 3 (stdlib-only bootstrap.py)

review_ritual.value: Manager verifies against repos (git evidence), never against agent reports (playbook R2); owner reviews via docs/owner-queue.md and orders via control/inbox.md.

staleness_review.value: control/status.md is refreshed every working session (its updated: line is the heartbeat); docs/playbook.md and docs/owner-queue.md are living and updated the day a lesson lands or an ask resolves.
